---
title: "Public Health Whole Genome Sequencing Analysis Report"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    vertical_layout: fill
    navbar:
      - { title: "ODHL", href: "https://odh.ohio.gov/know-our-programs/microbiology/microbiology", align_right}
    logo: "odh_logo_240128.png"
params:
  configFILE: "REP_CONFIG"
  sampletable: "REP_SAMPLETABLE"
  snpmatrix: "REP_SNPMATRIX"
  tree: "REP_IQTREE"
  cgstats: "REP_CGSTATS"
  arpredictions: "REP_PREDICT"
  metadata: "REP_META"
  testing: "N"
  obid: "REP_OB"
  date: "REP_DATE"
  refs: "REF_REFSAMPLES"
  dblookup: "REP_DBLOOKUP"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r libs, echo=FALSE, include=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(ape)
library(argparser)
library(crosstalk)
library(DT)
library(flexdashboard)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggtree)
library(heatmaply)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(kableExtra)
library(lubridate)
library(pander)
library(phytools)
library(plotly)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(rgl)
library(rmarkdown)
library(yaml)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
options(rgl.useNULL = TRUE)
'%ni%' <- function(x,y)!('%in%'(x,y))
```

```{r args, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
username <- "S. Chill"
reporttype <- "Outbreak"

if (params$testing == "N"){
  configFILE    <- params$configFILE
  sampletable   <- params$sampletable
  snpmatrix     <- params$snpmatrix
  tree          <- params$tree
  cgstats       <- params$cgstats
  arpredictions <- params$arpredictions
  metadata      <- params$metadata
  obid          <- params$obid
  date          <- params$date
  refpath       <- params$refs
  dblookup      <- params$dblookup
} else {
  obid          <- "OH-M6588-231201"
  date          <- "12/18/23"
  sampletable   <- "final_report.csv"
  snpmatrix     <- "snp_distance_matrix.tsv"
  tree          <- "core_genome.tree"
  cgstats       <- "core_genome_statistics.txt"
  arpredictions <- "ar_predictions.tsv"
  metadata      <- "manifest.csv"
  refpath       <- "ref_samples.csv"
  dblookup      <- "db_lookup.csv"
}
```

```{r prep, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
config <- read_yaml(configFILE)
subHeaderText <- paste0(config$sub.title, ": ", reporttype)
headerDF <- data.frame(date = date, ob = obid, project = obid, name = username)
summaryTEXT    <- config$summary.paragraph
disclaimerTEXT <- config$disclaimer.text
methodsTEXT    <- config$methods.text
referenceTEXT  <- config$reference.text
rootMethod <- config$root.method
```

```{r read, echo=FALSE}
# Read in reference IDs
reference_list <- read.csv(refpath, header = FALSE)
ref_ids <- trimws(reference_list$V1)

# Read in sample metadata
sampleDF <- subset(read.csv(sampletable, stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
                   specimen_id!="")

# Simplify specimen IDs
sampleDF$specimen_id <- sub("-.*$", "", sampleDF$specimen_id)

# Remove ref samples from sampleDF so only source samples are counted/displayed
sampleDF <- subset(sampleDF, !(specimen_id %in% ref_ids))

# Add metadata to sampleDF
rownames(sampleDF) <- sampleDF$specimen_id
metadataDF <- read.csv(metadata, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
needed  <- c("specimen_id","isolation_source","pt_county","healthcare_origin","submitter_name","collect_date")
missing <- setdiff(needed, names(metadataDF))
for (m in missing) metadataDF[[m]] <- NA_character_

# Merge metadata (left join — keep only samples with analysis data)
sampleDF <- merge(sampleDF, metadataDF[, needed], by = "specimen_id", all.x = TRUE)
rownames(sampleDF) <- NULL

# Format some columns
sampleDF$collect_date <- sapply(strsplit(as.character(sampleDF$collect_date), "/"), `[`, 1)

# Fill srr_id / samn_id / seq_date from db_lookup (pre-extracted non-OB entries from db_master)
sampleDF$seq_date <- as.Date(NA)
if (file.exists(dblookup)) {
  dbm <- read.csv(dblookup, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  dbm <- dbm[!duplicated(dbm$OHIO_ID), ]
  sampleDF <- merge(sampleDF, dbm, by.x = "specimen_id", by.y = "OHIO_ID", all.x = TRUE)
  sampleDF$srr_id  <- ifelse(sampleDF$srr_id  == "" | sampleDF$srr_id  == "NO_ID" | is.na(sampleDF$srr_id),
                              sampleDF$SRRID, sampleDF$srr_id)
  sampleDF$samn_id <- ifelse(sampleDF$samn_id == "" | sampleDF$samn_id == "NO_ID" | is.na(sampleDF$samn_id),
                              sampleDF$SAMID, sampleDF$samn_id)
  sampleDF$seq_date <- as.Date(as.character(sampleDF$DATE_ASSIGNED), format = "%Y%m%d")
  sampleDF$SRRID <- NULL
  sampleDF$SAMID <- NULL
  sampleDF$DATE_ASSIGNED <- NULL
}
# Keep SRR blank when unavailable; do not substitute specimen IDs in the SRR column.
sampleDF$srr_id <- ifelse(is.na(sampleDF$srr_id) | sampleDF$srr_id == "NO_ID" | sampleDF$srr_id == "",
                           NA_character_, sampleDF$srr_id)

# Read in other data
snpData <- read.csv(snpmatrix, sep = "\t", check.names = FALSE, row.names = 1)
treepath <- tree
cgstats <- read.csv(cgstats, sep = "\t", header = FALSE)
ar_summary <- read.csv(arpredictions, sep = "\t", check.names = FALSE)
ar_summary$Sample <- gsub("_[0-9]{1,4}_length_[0-9]*","", ar_summary$Sample)
ar_summary <- ar_summary[!duplicated(ar_summary), ]

# Prepare IDs for hiding columns in DT
generate_ids <- function(list_in) which(colnames(sampleDF) %ni% list_in) - 1
id_nums  <- generate_ids(c("auto_qc_outcome","specimen_id","lab_results","srr_id","samn_id","wgs_id","mlst1","healthcare_origin","seq_date"))
tax_nums <- generate_ids(c("specimen_id","species","sequence_classification","mlst_1","gamma_beta_lactam_resistance_genes"))
qc_nums  <- generate_ids(c("specimen_id","estimated_coverage","genome_length","auto_qc_failure_reason"))
strip_repeat_suffix <- function(x) sub("repeat$", "", x, ignore.case = TRUE)
sampleDF_display <- sampleDF
sampleDF_display$specimen_id <- strip_repeat_suffix(sampleDF_display$specimen_id)
sample_meta <- crosstalk::SharedData$new(sampleDF_display)
```

```{r summarytext, echo=FALSE}
pass_n        <- nrow(subset(sampleDF, auto_qc_outcome == "PASS"))
failed_n      <- nrow(subset(sampleDF, auto_qc_outcome != "PASS"))
failed_samples<- strip_repeat_suffix(subset(sampleDF, auto_qc_outcome != "PASS")$specimen_id)
ref_samples   <- length(ref_ids)

summaryTEXT <- paste0("There were ", nrow(sampleDF)," samples analyzed and ",
                     pass_n, " samples passed quality control thresholds, while ",
                     length(failed_samples)," failed.")
if (failed_n > 0){
  summaryTEXT <- paste0(summaryTEXT,
                       " Failing samples included: ",
                       paste(failed_samples, collapse = " | "), ".")
}
summaryTEXT <- paste0(summaryTEXT,
                      " An additional ", ref_samples, " samples were used for reference (ODHL_ref, REF).")
```

Information {data-orientation=columns data-icon="fa-info-circle"}
=================================================================
Column {data-width=600}
-----------------------
### `r subHeaderText` 
```{r intro}
colnames(headerDF) <- c("REPORT DATE","OUTBREAK ID","PROJECT NAME","PREPARED BY")
pander(headerDF)
```

### METHODS
`r methodsTEXT`
`r config$tree.text`
`r if(exists('treepath') & exists('cgstats')){paste("Core Genes Identified: ",cgstats[cgstats$V1 == 'Core genes',3],'\n')}`
`r if(exists('treepath') & exists('cgstats')){paste("Total Genes Identified: ",cgstats[cgstats$V1 == 'Total genes',3])}`

Column {data-width=600}
-----------------------
### Summary
`r summaryTEXT`

`r referenceTEXT`

### DISCLAIMER
`r disclaimerTEXT`

Analysis {data-icon="ion-search"}
=================================================================

Column {data-width=38}
----------------------

### Samples Table

```{r ids, echo=FALSE}
sample_meta %>%
  DT::datatable(
    extensions = c("Buttons","Scroller","FixedHeader"),
    rownames = FALSE,
    style = "bootstrap",
    width = "100%",
    class = "compact",
    options = list(
      dom = "Blfrtip",
      deferRender = TRUE,
      scroller = TRUE,
      scrollY = "70vh",
      pageLength = 10,
      fixedHeader = TRUE,
      columnDefs = list(list(visible = FALSE, targets = id_nums)),
      buttons = list(I("colvis"), "csv", "excel")
    ),
    colnames = c(
      "QC" = "auto_qc_outcome",
      "eLIMS_ID" = "specimen_id",
      "Lab_Results" = "lab_results",
      "SRR_ID" = "srr_id",
      "SAMN_ID" = "samn_id",
      "WGS" = "wgs_id",
      "MLST" = "mlst_1",
      "healthcare_origin" = "healthcare_origin",
      "Seq_Date" = "seq_date"
    )
  )
```

Column {data-width=62}
----------------------

### Phylogenetic Tree

```{r treeparams}
if (exists('treepath') & !is.null(ape::read.tree(treepath))) {
  set.seed(42)
  tree <- ape::read.tree(treepath)
  count <- 1
  for (i in seq_along(tree$tip.label)) {
    fullID <- tree$tip.label[i]
    id <- sub("-.*$", "", fullID, perl = TRUE)
    if (exists("ref_ids") && id %in% ref_ids) {
      tree$tip.label[i] <- paste0("ref", count)
      count <- count + 1
    } else {
      tree$tip.label[i] <- id
    }
  }
  if (rootMethod == 'midpoint') tree <- midpoint.root(tree)
  else if (rootMethod != 'unrooted') {
    node <- match(rootMethod, tree$tip.label)
    if (!is.na(node)) tree <- reroot(tree, node)
  }
}
```

#### Ancestral Tree
```{r treepruned}
if (exists('treepath') & !is.null(ape::read.tree(treepath))) {
  x <- fastBM(tree)
  obj <- contMap(tree, x)
  plot(obj, type = "fan", lwd = 2, fsize = c(.8, .5))
} else {
  print("Not enough difference at 80% conformity")
}
```

#### Cladogram
```{r tree, message=FALSE}
if (exists('treepath') & !is.null(ape::read.tree(treepath))) {
  p <- ggtree(tree, branch.length = "none") + layout_dendrogram()
  d <- p$data; bs <- d[!d$isTip,]; bs$label <- as.numeric(bs$label)
  ggtree_plot <- p + geom_text(data = bs, aes(label = label, vjust = 1.2), size = 2)
  rownames(sampleDF) <- sampleDF$specimen_id
  sampleDF$ref <- as.integer(factor(sampleDF$healthcare_origin, levels = unique(sampleDF$healthcare_origin)))
  labels <- p$data$label[p$data$label %ni% bs$label]
  d <- data.frame(label = labels, 
                  ref   = sampleDF[labels, c("ref")],
                  mlst  = ifelse(is.na(sampleDF[labels, c("mlst_1")]), "Ref",
                                 sampleDF[labels, c("mlst_1")]))
  ggtree_plot %<+% d +
    layout_dendrogram() +
    geom_tippoint(aes(fill = factor(mlst), x = x + .5), size = 6, shape = 21, color = 'black') +
    geom_tiplab(aes(label = ref), size = 2.5, offset = -.4, color = 'black') +
    geom_tiplab(aes(label = strip_repeat_suffix(label)), hjust = 1, offset = -1.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
    theme_dendrogram(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 80, 0))
}
```

Advanced Analysis {data-icon="fa-calendar"}
=================================================================

Column {data-width=38}
-----------------------

### AMR Gene Presence (beta-lactams) {data-height=550}

```{r amrtable, echo=FALSE}
src_ar <- ar_summary[, c("Sample", "Gene")]
src_ar$Sample <- sub("-.*$", "", src_ar$Sample)
src_ar <- src_ar[src_ar$Sample %in% sampleDF$specimen_id & grepl("^bla", src_ar$Gene), ]
src_ar <- src_ar[!duplicated(src_ar), ]
all_genes <- sort(unique(src_ar$Gene))
amr_matrix <- data.frame(Sample = sampleDF$specimen_id, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
for (g in all_genes) {
  amr_matrix[[g]] <- ifelse(amr_matrix$Sample %in% src_ar$Sample[src_ar$Gene == g], "X", "")
}
amr_matrix$Sample <- strip_repeat_suffix(amr_matrix$Sample)
DT::datatable(
  amr_matrix,
  rownames = FALSE,
  style = "bootstrap",
  width = "100%",
  class = "compact cell-border",
  extensions = c("Buttons", "FixedColumns"),
  options = list(
    dom = "Bt",
    scrollX = TRUE,
    scrollY = "400px",
    fixedColumns = list(leftColumns = 1),
    pageLength = nrow(amr_matrix),
    buttons = list("csv", "excel"),
    columnDefs = list(list(className = "dt-center", targets = seq_len(length(all_genes))))
  )
)
```

### SNP Distance: Within-Outbreak vs Reference {data-height=450}

```{r snpdist, echo=FALSE}
if (exists("snpData") && length(ref_ids) > 0) {
  mat_names <- rownames(snpData)
  short_names <- sub("-.*$", "", mat_names)
  get_mat_id <- function(ids) {
    sapply(ids, function(id) {
      idx <- which(short_names == id)
      if (length(idx) > 0) mat_names[idx[1]] else NA_character_
    })
  }
  src_mat <- get_mat_id(sampleDF$specimen_id)
  ref_mat <- get_mat_id(ref_ids)
  src_mat <- src_mat[!is.na(src_mat)]
  ref_mat <- ref_mat[!is.na(ref_mat)]

  src_snp  <- as.matrix(snpData[src_mat, src_mat])
  src_vals <- src_snp[upper.tri(src_snp)]
  ref_vals <- as.numeric(as.matrix(snpData[src_mat, ref_mat, drop = FALSE]))

  dist_df <- data.frame(
    distance = c(src_vals, ref_vals),
    group = factor(
      c(rep("Within Outbreak", length(src_vals)),
        rep("Source vs Reference", length(ref_vals))),
      levels = c("Within Outbreak", "Source vs Reference")
    )
  )
  within_range <- paste0("Range: ", min(src_vals), "\u2013", max(src_vals), " SNPs")
  ref_range    <- paste0("Range: ", min(ref_vals), "\u2013", max(ref_vals), " SNPs")
  plot_ly(dist_df, x = ~group, y = ~distance, type = "violin",
          color = ~group, colors = c("#2196F3", "#F44336"),
          box = list(visible = TRUE),
          meanline = list(visible = TRUE),
          points = "all", jitter = 0.3,
          pointpos = 0) %>%
    layout(xaxis = list(title = ""),
           yaxis = list(title = "Pairwise SNP Distance"),
           showlegend = FALSE,
           margin = list(t = 20),
           annotations = list(
             list(x = "Within Outbreak",     y = max(src_vals), text = within_range,
                  showarrow = FALSE, yshift = 10, font = list(size = 11)),
             list(x = "Source vs Reference", y = max(ref_vals), text = ref_range,
                  showarrow = FALSE, yshift = 10, font = list(size = 11))
           ))
} else {
  print("SNP data not available")
}
```

Column {data-width=62}
-----------------------

### Cladogram by Sequencing Month
```{r tree_month, message=FALSE}
if (exists('treepath') & !is.null(ape::read.tree(treepath))) {
  p2 <- ggtree(tree, branch.length = "none") + layout_dendrogram()
  d2 <- p2$data; bs2 <- d2[!d2$isTip,]; bs2$label <- as.numeric(bs2$label)
  ggtree_plot2 <- p2 + geom_text(data = bs2, aes(label = label, vjust = 1.2), size = 2)
  rownames(sampleDF) <- sampleDF$specimen_id
  labels2 <- p2$data$label[p2$data$label %ni% bs2$label]
  month_val <- ifelse(
    labels2 %in% sampleDF$specimen_id & !is.na(sampleDF[labels2, "seq_date"]),
    format(as.Date(sampleDF[labels2, "seq_date"]), "%Y-%m"),
    "Ref"
  )
  d2 <- data.frame(label = labels2, month = month_val)
  ggtree_plot2 %<+% d2 +
    layout_dendrogram() +
    geom_tippoint(aes(fill = factor(month), x = x + .5), size = 6, shape = 21, color = 'black') +
    geom_tiplab(aes(label = strip_repeat_suffix(label)), hjust = 1, offset = -1.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
    theme_dendrogram(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 80, 0)) +
    labs(fill = "Seq Month")
}
```
